struct EmailAddress(String);

impl EmailAddress {
    fn new(s: String) -> Result<Self, String> {
        if s.contains('@') {
            Ok(Self(s))
        } else {
            Err(format!("invalid email: {s}"))
        }
    }
}

struct Port(u16);

impl Port {
    fn new(v: u16) -> Result<Self, String> {
        if v == 0 {
            Err("port must be non-zero".into())
        } else {
            Ok(Self(v))
        }
    }
}

struct Username(String);

impl Username {
    fn new(s: String) -> Result<Self, String> {
        if s.is_empty() {
            Err("username cannot be empty".into())
        } else {
            Ok(Self(s))
        }
    }
}

struct Config {
    email: EmailAddress,
    port: Port,
    username: Username,
}

fn make_config(email: &str, port: u16, username: &str) -> Result<Config, String> {
    Ok(Config {
        email: EmailAddress::new(email.into())?,
        port: Port::new(port)?,
        username: Username::new(username.into())?,
    })
}
